# GAIS AI Legal Risk Analysis System

## Project Overview
GAIS AI使用上の法的リスク分析システム - A comprehensive web application for GAIS (Generative AI Association) members to analyze legal risks in AI usage and automatically generate legal documents.

## Live Demo
- Production URL: https://graph-rag-chatbot-vercel.vercel.app
- Demo Video: https://graph-rag-chatbot-vercel.vercel.app/intro-video.mp4 (1min 26sec, 29MB)
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/Aso2180/graph-rag-chatbot-vercel

## Core Features

### 1. 5-Step Detailed Diagnosis Wizard
- Basic Information: App name, description, pricing model (7 types)
- AI Usage: AI technologies (12 types), providers (11 types), use cases (13 types)
- Data Handling: Input data types (13 types), transmission (3 types), storage (8 types)
- Target Users: User attributes (14 types), GDPR/COPPA compliance detection
- Risk Concerns: Risk areas (15 items), additional notes

### 2. AI Legal Risk Analysis
- Analysis Engine: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929)
- Integrated Search: GraphRAG (Neo4j) + Web Search (Tavily) parallel processing
- Risk Assessment: HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW 3-tier evaluation
- Output: Executive summary, detailed risk analysis, priority actions, related cases

### 3. Legal Document Auto-Generation (5 Types)
1. Terms of Service: Service conditions, disclaimers, governing law
2. Privacy Policy: Personal data protection policy, data handling
3. AI Disclaimer: AI function limitations, accuracy disclaimers
4. Internal Risk Report: Risk assessment for management
5. User Guidelines: Safe usage guidance

Features:
- Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming generation
- Parallel processing of multiple documents
- Real-time preview, copy, download

### 4. GraphRAG Integrated Search
- PDF Upload: Automatic analysis of legal materials (max 20MB)
- Markdown Import: Bulk retrieval from GitHub repositories
- Graph Database: Structured knowledge storage in Neo4j Aura
- Web Search Integration: Latest regulations and case law via Tavily API
- Document Management: Member statistics, list view, deletion

### 5. 3-Step Workflow
Step 1: Usage Context Input
- Basic info (4 items): Internal use, corporate service, registration, external API
- AI-generated content types (4 types): Text, image, video, audio
- Usage purposes (7 types): Internal training, operations, company intro, recruitment, marketing, customer service, product integration
- File upload: PDF/Markdown, GitHub repository integration

Step 2: Risk Analysis
- Detailed diagnosis wizard (5 steps)
- AI legal risk analysis (max 5 minutes)
- Real-time chat consultation
- Risk hints display

Step 3: Terms Generation
- Document type selection (max 5 types)
- Company info input
- Streaming generation (max 5 minutes)
- Preview, copy, download

### 6. Member Dashboard
- Upload statistics (documents, pages, analysis chunks)
- Document list and details
- Document deletion
- Upload history

### 7. Introduction Video Modal
- Auto-display on first access (localStorage management)
- Maximize/minimize functionality
- Skippable
- "Don't show again" option

## Technology Stack

### Frontend
- Next.js 14.2.35 (App Router)
- React 18 + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS 4

### Backend
- Next.js API Routes (Serverless Functions)
- Anthropic Claude API (Sonnet 4.5: claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929)
- Neo4j Aura Professional (GraphRAG)
- Tavily API (Web Search)

### File Processing
- pdf-parse-new: PDF parsing
- Markdown Parser: MD document processing

### Deployment
- Vercel (Hosting, Function execution time settings)
- Neo4j Aura (Cloud database)

## Security Features

### Implemented
- Email Address Verification: GAIS member email identification
- Rate Limiting (implemented on some APIs):
  - Upload: 10 files/day
  - Member stats: 200 requests/hour
- Content Moderation:
  - File type verification (PDF/Markdown only)
  - File size limit (max 20MB)
  - Filename validation (executable files excluded, special chars restricted)
  - Duplicate upload prevention (same file within 1 hour)
- Environment Variable Management: Secure storage of API keys and secrets

## API Endpoints (17 Total)

### Production Endpoints (13)
- /api/chat - Chat message processing (60s timeout)
- /api/upload - PDF/MD file upload
- /api/import/github - GitHub repo MD retrieval
- /api/diagnosis/analyze - Risk diagnosis analysis (300s timeout)
- /api/generator/generate - Document generation (normal)
- /api/generator/generate-stream - Document generation (SSE, 300s timeout)
- /api/graph-search - GraphRAG search (60s timeout)
- /api/web-search - Web search
- /api/member-stats - Member statistics
- /api/document-content - Document content retrieval
- /api/document-delete - Document deletion
- /api/learn - Document learning
- /api/admin/default-documents - Default document management

### Debug Endpoints (4 - Development Only)
- /api/debug - Debug information
- /api/debug-neo4j - Neo4j connection check
- /api/test-upload - Upload test
- /api/schedule-learn - Learning schedule

## Project Structure

### Components (26 TSX files)
- diagnosis/ - Diagnosis-related components
  - DiagnosisWizard.tsx - Main wizard
  - DiagnosisResult.tsx - Result display
  - WizardProgress.tsx - Progress indicator
  - steps/ - 5 diagnosis steps
- generator/ - Document generation components
  - DocumentGenerator.tsx - Main generator
  - DocumentTypeSelector.tsx - Type selector
  - DocumentPreview.tsx - Preview and download
  - DocumentGenerationProgress.tsx - Generation progress
- steps/ - Main flow components
  - Step1UserContext.tsx - Usage context input
  - Step2RiskAnalysis.tsx - Risk analysis
  - Step3TermsGeneration.tsx - Terms generation
  - StepNavigation.tsx - Navigation
  - DiagnosisProgress.tsx - Diagnosis progress
- ui/ - UI components
  - Modal.tsx, Checkbox.tsx, RadioGroup.tsx, card.tsx
- ChatInterface.tsx - Main interface
- MemberDashboard.tsx - Dashboard
- VideoIntroModal.tsx - Video modal
- LegalDisclaimer.tsx - Legal disclaimer

### Libraries (9 files)
- anthropic/ - Claude API integration
- neo4j/ - Neo4j connection and queries
- member/ - Member management and validation
- rate-limit/ - Rate limiting
- moderation/ - Content moderation
- pdf/ - PDF processing
- config/ - Environment configuration

### Type Definitions (4 files)
- chat.ts - Chat types
- diagnosis.ts - Diagnosis types
- document.ts - Document types
- userContext.ts - User context types

## Setup

### Required Environment Variables
```
NEO4J_URI=neo4j+s://[your-instance].databases.neo4j.io
NEO4J_USER=neo4j
NEO4J_PASSWORD=[your-password]
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=[your-claude-api-key]
TAVILY_API_KEY=[your-tavily-api-key]
NODE_ENV=development
```

### Installation
```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

Access at http://localhost:3000

## Vercel Deployment

### Vercel Configuration (vercel.json)
Function execution time settings:
- /api/generator/generate-stream/route.ts: 300s
- /api/diagnosis/analyze/route.ts: 300s
- /api/chat/route.ts: 60s
- /api/graph-search/route.ts: 60s

### Environment Variables (Vercel Dashboard)
Same as local setup, with NODE_ENV=production

## Key Files

- /app/page.tsx - Home page entry point
- /components/ChatInterface.tsx - Main application interface
- /components/diagnosis/DiagnosisWizard.tsx - 5-step diagnosis wizard
- /components/generator/DocumentGenerator.tsx - Document generation system
- /lib/neo4j/client.ts - Neo4j database connection
- /lib/anthropic/client.ts - Claude API client
- /types/diagnosis.ts - Type definitions for diagnosis
- /types/document.ts - Type definitions for documents
- /public/intro-video.mp4 - Introduction video (29MB)

## Innovation Highlights

1. **Integrated Risk Analysis**: Combines GraphRAG knowledge base with real-time web search for comprehensive legal risk assessment
2. **5-Step Detailed Diagnosis**: Covers 12 AI technologies, 11 providers, 13 use cases, 13 data types, 14 user attributes, 15 risk areas
3. **Streaming Document Generation**: Real-time generation of 5 types of legal documents using SSE
4. **GitHub Integration**: Automatic import of markdown files from public repositories for knowledge expansion
5. **Neo4j GraphRAG**: Structured knowledge representation for advanced semantic search
6. **Multi-Modal Content**: Supports text, image, video, audio AI-generated content analysis
7. **Compliance Detection**: Automatic GDPR and COPPA compliance requirements detection

## Impact & Use Cases

- Legal risk assessment for AI service development
- Automatic generation of Terms of Service and Privacy Policies
- Internal risk reporting for management
- Compliance checking for GDPR/COPPA requirements
- Knowledge sharing among GAIS members through document uploads
- Real-time consultation via integrated chat function

## Technical Achievements

- Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration for advanced legal analysis
- Neo4j Aura GraphRAG implementation for knowledge graphs
- Server-Sent Events (SSE) for real-time streaming
- Vercel serverless functions with custom timeout configurations
- Multi-source data integration (PDFs, Markdown, GitHub, Web)
- Responsive design with mobile support
- LocalStorage-based preference management

## Version Information
- Version: 2.0.0
- Node.js: 18.x
- Next.js: 14.2.35
- Last Updated: 2025-02-23
